case_title: LISA MURPHY VS. HOMEI NAIMI ET AL

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-23-2015 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO SEP-24-2015 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANTS (3) WERE PRESENT.
